title: Teucrium leucosceptrum
intro: Teucrium leucosceptrum, also known as the Silverleaf Germander, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic properties, which may be attributed to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The bioactive constituents of Teucrium leucosceptrum have been found to possess antioxidant, hepatoprotective, and neuroprotective activities. The plant is commonly used in traditional medicine and is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, which are considered to be the most common herbal preparations made from this plant.

It is also used to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant properties.
